systems.name: Codex Context Assembly
systems.description: Per-turn fragment producer + bundle assembler pipeline.

containers.name: packages/opencode session context-fragments
containers.description: Hosts fragment producers and the BundleAssembler.

containers.name: packages/opencode session llm.ts
containers.description: Wires fragment producers into developer + user bundles for the codex upstream-wire path.

components.name: opencode_user_system_addenda producer
components.description: NEW: body = user.system joined; omitted when empty.

components.name: BundleAssembler
components.description: Existing; consumes fragment list, bins by role, emits developer + user bundles.

components.name: codex upstream-wire fragment build
components.description: Replaces single agent_instructions build with two builds at distinct bundle positions.

relationships.label: invokes for user bundle tail (conditional on non-empty user.system)
